meta.title: Investment in shares versus investment in other assets
meta.sourceDoc: 42. P2 - Investment in shares versus investment in other assets 回报数据分析.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Investment in shares versus investment in other assets 回报数据分析

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：iii
PDF 定位："it all began in 1958 with a phone call.. The resul... was the launch of... CRSP... CRSP data are everywhere... influenced much ofthe rest."（第A段）
PDF 解析：A段从"一个电话的请求"起笔，到促成CRSP成立并对后世研究产生广泛 影响，完全对应"Arequestandafar-reachingresult"。

题目 15
答案：iv
PDF 定位："Getting the CRSP data together was a tough process in the iv early days of computers... millions of pieces ... transferred from paper to magnetic tape ... adjusting prices... complexities in the market."（第B段）
PDF 解析：讲述数据搜集的困难：技术早期、数据量巨大、从纸本转磁带、价格校正 复杂，所以选"DifficultiesincollectingCRSPdata"。

题目 16
答案：ii
PDF 定位："When... published the first study... they reported the annual compound return...first empirical support for the idea that shares outperform.."（第C段）
PDF 解析：C段呈现首次研究结果与"股票长期更优"的结论，正是"Initialfindings of the CRSP project"。

题目 17
答案：i
PDF 定位："Myron Scholes... ensured the database was kept up to date and readily available... as computing power became more affordable... database has sincebeen expanded..." (第D段)
PDF 解析：强调技术/计算能力提升与数据库更新扩容，对应"Technological developments improve CRSP data"。

题目 18
答案：viii
PDF 定位："Prices... rise and fall randomly... no predictable movements... vili some temporary short-term predictability... anomalies...typically disappear."(第E段)
PDF 解析：Fama认为市场有效、规律一旦被发现就消失，用CRSP挖到的"规律" 未必能长期指导投资，故选"cRSPdatanotalwaysbeingauseful basis forinvestment"。

题目 19
答案：vi
PDF 定位：vi "the sheer volume of material... economists becoming increasingly specialised...fail to see and understand the whole... should have talked to grandpa."(第F段)
PDF 解析：批评数据太多导致只见树木不见森林，无法把握整体，对应"Toomuch data for people to have an overall understanding"。

题目 20
答案：v
PDF 定位："Scholes responds... demand... continues to grow... plans...to publish indicators... will be more rigorous and cheaper... ensure CRSP's continuing success."(第G段)
PDF 解析：展望CRSP未来计划与前景，匹配"Whatthefutureholds"。

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：D
PDF 定位："to have seen the 2008 crisis coming, it would have been better to go back to old-fashioned readings of history...We should havetalked tograndpa."（第F段）
PDF 解析：Shiller主张用更传统的方法（历史、制度、法律）或能更早预见 金融下行。

题目 22
答案：A
PDF 定位："many people chose to invest in assets with lower returns because they were cautious... concerned about the risk... (第C段)
PDF 解析：他们指出：一些人因保守而投资低回报资产，因此赚得更少。

题目 23
答案：C
PDF 定位："over a lengthy period prices... randomly... no predictable movements... some temporary short-term predictability." (第E段)
PDF 解析：Fama认可短期可能可预测，但长期不能预测，完全对应题干。

questionSections.text:
题目 24
答案：banker
PDF 定位："a banker at Merill Lynch... who wanted to know how investors in shares had performed..." (第A段)
PDF 解析：1958年打电话的人身份即banker。

题目 25
答案：computers
PDF 定位："a tough process in what were then the early days of computers."(第B段)
PDF 解析：困难原因：计算机仍在早期发展阶段。

题目 26
答案：paper
PDF 定位："information... were transferred frompape...tomagnetic tape." （第B段)
PDF 解析：之前在纸张上的信息需转成磁带。
